title: Why Next.js Is the Right Tech Stack for Solo Developers
content:
SSR, SSG, excellent SEO, free hosting on Vercel, multi-site support in one project, and a rich ecosystem. Compared to WordPress which requires a server, or Hugo which has limited functionality, Next.js + Vercel is the optimal choice for solo entrepreneurs.

SSR, SSG, excellent SEO, free hosting on Vercel, multi-site support in one project, and a rich ecosystem. Compared to WordPress which requires a server, or Hugo which has limited functionality, Next.js + Vercel is the optimal choice for solo entrepreneurs.
